_doc: LLM surfaces used by the live Stage 04/06 discovery path. After the rework there are two optional routed LLM calls in this area: the fallback query planner and the SERP reranker. Updated 2026-03-18.

query_journey_fallback_planner.gate: Used only when Schema 4 is disabled or fewer than 6 guarded Schema 4 queries survive. No routed plan key returns deterministic fallback queries.

payload.missing_fields: grouped field inventory with uncovered_search_worthy hints

query_journey_fallback_planner.failure_mode: Any gate failure, missing route, empty LLM response, or exception falls back to deterministic queries.

serp_reranker.gate: Runs only when SERP triage is enabled, deterministic quality is insufficient, and routed plan access exists.

payload.results: top deterministic rows with rank, url, host, title, snippet, and score_det

serp_reranker.failure_mode: Route absence, LLM failure, or empty selections fall back to deterministic ordering. An explicit all-drop response is preserved as an explicit all-drop outcome.
